description: E main effect on Q-AC accuracy (E1 > E2, one-tailed chi-squared)
verdict: H2.1 SUPPORTED: Explanation significantly increases absent-content accuracy (p=0.0437).

description: L × E interaction on M2 trust (two-way ANOVA; simple effects if F sig.)
verdict: H2.2 NOT SUPPORTED: L × E interaction not significant (F = 2.511, p = 0.1223). Null result; 90% CI on interaction term reported above. E and L marginal means reported descriptively.

description: I2 reduces M4 miscalibration residual in L2 [CONDITIONAL on Study 1 H4]
verdict: H2.3 SKIPPED (conditional test; Study 1 H4 not supported)

description: M1 (Q-AC accuracy) predicts M3 download click (logistic regression)
verdict: H2.4 NOT SUPPORTED: M1 does not significantly predict download click (OR = 0.84, p = 0.8281).
